		public static int ReadIntLittleEndian(byte[] buffer, int index)

			int num2 = num;

					break;

		public override void UpdateLogic()
		{
			//IL_0133: Unknown result type (might be due to invalid IL or missing references)
			int num = 16;
			bool flag = default(bool);

		public string IsEntityValid(string hwid)
		{

									num3 = 1;
								}
								continue;
							case 1:
								break;
							}
							break;
						}

					finally
					{

						{
							int num4 = 0;
							if (<Module>{f6240d13-e623-4b89-aa88-adeab8ac7cd5}.m_cd2c670d46b645888f9fc53ccfe89a30.m_dd3ac919a48547aebcf1813a9c5fb595 != 0)

					{
						num2 = 5;
						if (<Module>{f6240d13-e623-4b89-aa88-adeab8ac7cd5}.m_cd2c670d46b645888f9fc53ccfe89a30.m_7c0d34d3cf9e491780ce0e846aa27d57 == 0)

						continue;
					}
					goto case 20;
				case 26:

		public static bool HasComponent<T>(this Entity entity) where T : struct
		{
			//IL_0001: Unknown result type (might be due to invalid IL or missing references)
			//IL_0006: Unknown result type (might be due to invalid IL or missing references)
			//IL_0009: Unknown result type (might be due to invalid IL or missing references)
			//IL_0010: Unknown result type (might be due to invalid IL or missing references)
			EntityManager manager = Manager;
			return ((EntityManager)(ref manager)).HasComponent(entity, new ComponentType(Il2CppType.Of<T>(), (AccessMode)0));
		}

		public static T GetComponent<T>(this Entity entity) where T : struct
		{
			//IL_0001: Unknown result type (might be due to invalid IL or missing references)
			//IL_0006: Unknown result type (might be due to invalid IL or missing references)
			//IL_0009: Unknown result type (might be due to invalid IL or missing references)
			EntityManager manager = Manager;
			return ((EntityManager)(ref manager)).GetComponentData<T>(entity);
		}

		public static bool TryGetComponent<T>(this Entity entity, out T componentData) where T : struct
		{
			//IL_0008: Unknown result type (might be due to invalid IL or missing references)
			//IL_0017: Unknown result type (might be due to invalid IL or missing references)
			componentData = default(T);
			if (entity.HasComponent<T>())
			{
				componentData = entity.GetComponent<T>();
				return true;
			}
			return false;
		}

{
	public class EntityWrapper
	{

		internal static EntityWrapper oZtYHtbrkcU7i1RbBFN;

		public float HP => math.round(Health.Value);

		public virtual void Show()
		{

			//IL_009a: Unknown result type (might be due to invalid IL or missing references)

			//IL_009f: Unknown result type (might be due to invalid IL or missing references)

			if (!Enabled)

				}
			}
		}

			//IL_009f: Unknown result type (might be due to invalid IL or missing references)
			//IL_00d5: Unknown result type (might be due to invalid IL or missing references)
			//IL_00fc: Unknown result type (might be due to invalid IL or missing references)
			//IL_010f: Unknown result type (might be due to invalid IL or missing references)
			//IL_0166: Unknown result type (might be due to invalid IL or missing references)

			{
				return;
			}

			{

					{

					}

					DefaultInterpolatedStringHandler defaultInterpolatedStringHandler = new DefaultInterpolatedStringHandler(2, 2);

					defaultInterpolatedStringHandler.AppendLiteral(LPdwQx6wGfhWS0fYw59.ijRxiwgeJC(0x1C354AE9 ^ <Module>{f6240d13-e623-4b89-aa88-adeab8ac7cd5}.m_cd2c670d46b645888f9fc53ccfe89a30.m_dd3ac919a48547aebcf1813a9c5fb595));
					defaultInterpolatedStringHandler.AppendFormatted(creature.BloodQuality);
					Draw(position, defaultInterpolatedStringHandler.ToStringAndClear(), DefaultColor);
				}
			}
		}

		}

						{
						case 0:
							break;
						}
					}
					goto case 2;
				case 2:
				case 4:
					return result;
				case 1:
					enumerator = _abilities.Values.GetEnumerator();
					num2 = 0;
					if (<Module>{f6240d13-e623-4b89-aa88-adeab8ac7cd5}.m_cd2c670d46b645888f9fc53ccfe89a30.m_26fbbe980ef04404974c736307a058a1 == 0)
					{
						num2 = 0;
					}
					continue;
				case 3:
					break;
					end_IL_0012:
					break;
				}
				result = null;
				num2 = 2;
				if (<Module>{f6240d13-e623-4b89-aa88-adeab8ac7cd5}.m_cd2c670d46b645888f9fc53ccfe89a30.m_4aff06ae67bd495ebe64a40379534b50 != 0)
				{
					num2 = 2;
				}
			}
		}

		public static List<AbilityDescription> GetDefenceAbilities()
		{
			int num = 2;
			int num2 = num;
			List<AbilityDescription> result = default(List<AbilityDescription>);
			while (true)
			{
				switch (num2)
				{
				default:
					return result;
				case 2:
					result = _abilities.Values.Where((AbilityDescription a) => a.IsDefence).ToList();
					num2 = 1;
					if (<Module>{f6240d13-e623-4b89-aa88-adeab8ac7cd5}.m_cd2c670d46b645888f9fc53ccfe89a30.m_bc692873387f4719a107d25faf89151e != 0)
					{
						num2 = 1;
					}
					break;
				}
			}
		}

	public class AbilityDescription
	{
		public int PrefabGuid;

		public string Name;

		public int? SpawnPrefab;

		public float Speed;

		public float LifeTimeDuration;

		public bool IsAoE;

		public float Cooldown;

		public bool IsDefence;

		public bool IsDash;

		public bool IsUltimate;

		public float MaxCastTime;

		public float PostCastTime;

		internal static AbilityDescription u8mAuQdyAdaN9KvP1RY;

		public AbilityDescription()
		{
			LPdwQx6wGfhWS0fYw59.vDkxFXEBCZ();
			rcXsNgGHN2dn5GE7Qrf.ojWF0uTxuX();
			Speed = 0f;
			LifeTimeDuration = 0f;
			MaxCastTime = 0f;
			PostCastTime = 0f;
			base..ctor();
			int num = 0;
			if (<Module>{f6240d13-e623-4b89-aa88-adeab8ac7cd5}.m_cd2c670d46b645888f9fc53ccfe89a30.m_c87aadfab0d5416491468239b9105c61 == 0)
			{
				num = 0;
			}
			switch (num)
			{
			case 0:
				break;
			}
		}

		internal static bool XRtsPbd1Y3ehoSuTZCo()
		{
			return u8mAuQdyAdaN9KvP1RY == null;
		}

		internal static AbilityDescription AQgjw2djv96KKIi21lt()
		{
			return u8mAuQdyAdaN9KvP1RY;
		}
	}
